This is super off topic and a weird rant but I hate my instagram feed SO MUCH. I keep getting gender war ragebait slop content and it pisses me off. Not even the content itself, just the fact that some of it is genuinely serious. I get trapped reading the comments and it’s so fucking stupid. When did we as a society start getting at each other’s throats again? All because some of us are born with a dinaling and some of us aren’t? Were we not pushing for equality just a year or two ago? Yeah, I know things happen, I know it’s not all sunshine and rainbows out there. But it’s genuinely so bad now, at least from what I’ve been seeing. Let’s just go back to being positive and stop blatant sexism disguised as ragebait 🗣️ 🔥
